subject: feat(tags): add inline tag editing on transactions with ML suggestions
body:
Transactions in the dashboard table can now be clicked to expand an inline
tag editor. The editor shows current tags (removable), ML-suggested tags
via zero-shot classification, and a text input with autocomplete from
tagCache. Demo data now seeds tagCache so suggestions work from first load.

Tags: tags, ml, ux, dashboard, demo
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: auto-tagging
Semver: minor
